Our Neon Night: Inside H2O Glow After Hours 2026

We’re going out tonight. A little dancing, so many Mickey Ice Cream Bars, and six-foot waves. Then and Now: Shanghai Disney Resort’s First Decade and Its Vision for the Future

June 16, 2016, marked the moment the gates opened on Shanghai Disney Resort, the sixth Disney resort in the world and the first in China mainland. More than the debut of a new resort, it represented a defining chapter in how Disney storytelling could evolve, honoring a rich legacy while embracing new cultural perspectives and
